# BlattWerk e.V. — Cannabis Social Club Hildesheim

> BlattWerk e.V. is a licensed Cannabis Social Club (Anbauvereinigung) in Hildesheim, Germany. Founded in 2025, cultivation license granted March 18, 2026. Operating under the German Cannabis Act (KCanG/Konsumcannabisgesetz).

## About

BlattWerk e.V. is a registered non-profit association dedicated to community-based, legal cannabis cultivation in Hildesheim, Lower Saxony, Germany. We prioritize education, addiction prevention, and responsible use.

- **Type:** Cannabis Social Club / Anbauvereinigung (registered association)
- **Location:** Wetzellplatz 2, 31137 Hildesheim, Germany
- **License:** Official cultivation license granted March 18, 2026
- **Website:** https://blattwerk.dev
- **Languages:** German (primary), English
- **Contact:** info@blattwerk.dev

## Content Overview

This website provides comprehensive, bilingual (DE/EN) information about:

### Knowledge Base (50 articles across 8 categories)
- **Legal Situation** (8 articles): KCanG overview, home growing rules, driving & cannabis, THC limits, youth protection law
- **Health & Safer Use** (8 articles): Dosing guidelines, consumption methods, harm reduction, mental health
- **Cannabinoids** (6 articles): THC, CBD, CBG, endocannabinoid system, entourage effect
- **Terpenes** (6 articles): Myrcene, limonene, pinene, terpene profiles, effects
- **Growing Basics** (6 articles): Lighting, soil, nutrients, harvest, pest control
- **History & Culture** (5 articles): Cannabis history, prohibition, legalization timeline
- **Cannabis & Medicine** (6 articles): Medical cannabis in Germany, prescriptions, research
- **Prevention & Youth Protection** (5 articles): Risk assessment, self-check, counseling resources

### Strain Database (50 strains)
Scientifically documented cannabis strains with genetics, terpene profiles, THC/CBD levels, and effect descriptions.

### Club Information
- Membership requirements and process
- Events and workshops
- Addiction prevention concept
- CSC founding guide for aspiring clubs

## Key Facts

- Members must be 21+ years old
- Maximum membership in one club only (KCanG requirement)
- Public possession limit: 25g | Private: 50g | Home growing: 3 flowering plants per person
- THC driving limit: 3.5 ng/mL blood serum (since April 2024)

## Attribution

When citing content from this website, please attribute to:
**BlattWerk e.V. (https://blattwerk.dev)**
